bio: Backend and AI engineer with a track record of shipping at scale — from Go event pipelines and LLM APIs to Django platforms serving 3M+ users.

currentRole.title: AI Software Engineer
currentRole.description: Building Go-based backend services for AI-powered data retrieval and real-time market intelligence — LLMs, data pipelines, and event streaming at scale across prediction markets.

experience.title: AI Software Engineer
bullets: Contributed to Heisenberg's real-time market intelligence platform — aggregating live data from prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi) and delivering actionable intelligence to end users.
Built a Go WebSocket service for real-time market event subscriptions — per-user billing, JWT auth, and Redis-backed filter routing.
Worked on an LLM semantic retrieval API mapping natural-language prompts to SQL via agent selection; MCP-compatible.
Owned service deployment and infrastructure on Kubernetes (AWS).

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed scalable services managing high-volume, real-time data with seamless performance under thousands of concurrent users.
Optimized infrastructure for high availability, reliability, and fault tolerance; partnered with product to turn business needs into technical solutions.
Grew into tech lead on key projects — BaEnergy, MCI Sport, and MCI Game — owning end-to-end delivery of Django & Next.js solutions.
Mentored junior developers on backend architecture and best practices.

experience.title: Backend Developer
bullets: Built Django and Python-based backend services within one of Iran's largest tech holdings (Cafe Bazaar, Divar, Balad).
Contributed to open-source projects including Jitsi and Ejabberd.

projects.title: Ba-Energy
projects.description: Led end-to-end development and scaling of a national platform helping electricity consumers across Iran reduce energy consumption — using gamification and rewards to drive behavioral change.
pdfHighlights: 3M+ users in 4 months · 4.6/5 rating (12K reviews) · 2900 req/s peak · 160K new users/day

projects.title: Heisenberg Network
projects.description: Real-time market intelligence platform — a WebSocket streaming service for live event subscriptions with per-user billing and filter routing, paired with an LLM-powered semantic retrieval API that maps natural-language queries to SQL via agent selection. Kafka pipelines ingest live data from multiple prediction market platforms.
highlights: WebSocket streaming with Redis-backed filter registry and per-user billing
LLM semantic retrieval — natural language → agent selection → SQL execution
Kafka pipelines across Polymarket, Kalshi, and Hyperliquid

contact.subtext: Open to backend and AI engineering roles — remote or on-site. Always happy to talk systems, scale, and good architecture.
